steps.name: Click on 'System administration' menu in Header
Enter acquirer name 'Acquirer with Error Message'

parameters.name: acquirer
parameters.value: Acquirer[acquirerCode=NGenius, acquirerConfig=, systemConfig=SystemConfig[challengeUrl=//challenge.example.com, fingerprintUrl=//fingerprint.example.com, resourceUrl=ps://fingerprint.example.com, notificationQueue=ffff], acquirerName=Acquirer with Error Message, currencyList=[Ljava.lang.String;@c495bf6, isActive=true]
